generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence officer, I've seen firsthand how outdated laws tie our hands in protecting this country. The 2024 Domestic Security Enhancement Act gives our agencies the tools they need to stay ahead of evolving threats. Critics claim it's about 'expanding powers,' but in reality, it's about modernizing our capabilities to face 21st-century challenges. We can't afford to let perfect be the enemy of good when national security is at stake. #ModernizeToProtect
